title: Creamy Mexican Flat Rice Noodles Tlayudas
description: A funky and creamy Mexican dish featuring flat rice noodles and rest-meat, perfect for a weeknight dinner, and is Jain-friendly.

ingredients.name: rest-meat
ingredients.notes: such as leftover chicken or beans

instructions: Cook the flat rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the rest-meat and cook until heated through.
Stir in the mexican cream, shredded cheese, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the creamy sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional shredded cheese and a sprinkle of paprika if desired.
